assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Authentication.CookieLifetime to 8 hours and CookieSlidingExpiration to false
assertions.rationale: Line 20 sets CookieLifetime = TimeSpan.FromHours(8), line 21 sets CookieSlidingExpiration = false.
ServerSideSessions options are not configured at all. ExpiredSessionsTriggerBackchannelLogout is not set.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
assertions.rationale: AddServerSideSessions() is never called. The response mentions needing server-side sessions in the notes but doesn't actually implement it.

assertions.assertion: The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to a valid HTTPS URL

assertions.rationale: CoordinateClientLifetimesWithUserSession is not set anywhere in the code.
